prestazioni: Crank the C8-platform 4.0L TFSI V8 (engine code: **CWUB**) to 800 HP / 750 lb-ft via **APR Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo System** (utilizing **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and custom APR wastegates), paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.3:1 CR), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** for 28 psi peak boost on **Motul 300V 5W-40** full-synth oil

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP90** transmission with a **Reis Performance RS7-specific 8-speed PDK conversion kit** (including **South Bend twin-disc clutch**, **Reis billet torque converter**, and **034Motorsport transmission cooler**) for 150ms shifts and 1,200 Nm torque capacity, tuned via **Alientech KESS3** with **RS7-specific TCU flash** for launch control at 5,500 RPM

Install a **Wagner Tuning Competition Intercooler Kit** (100% direct-fit for CWUB, 4.5L core volume, 60% larger than OEM) with **Forge Motorsport silicone couplers** and **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm dual-port BOV**, paired with a **034Motorsport billet aluminum intake manifold** (ported for 20% improved flow) and **Bosch Motorsport 1,000cc injectors** for E85 compatibility
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit** (RS7-specific, 50mm rear fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter with **Audi Sport** logo inlay, and **Vorsteiner GT-style side skirts** with integrated LED turn signals), painted in **Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7W) with matte black accents**

**Ohlins RS7-specific DFV Coilovers** (2-way adjustable dampers, 40mm drop, **T6061 aluminum top mounts**, and **Swift Springs** at 14kg/mm front / 16kg/mm rear) paired with **H&R RS7-specific anti-roll bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) and **Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers** (400mm two-piece rotors, **Ferodo DS2500 pads**)

**Audi Sport Carbon Fiber Engine Cover** (with **CWUB** laser-engraved script) and **Akrapović Titanium Exhaust System** (dual 102mm outlets, **valvetronic bypass**, and **carbon fiber tips**), complemented by **Vossen HF-5 22x11 ET35 wheels** (matte bronze, **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 295/25R22 tires**) and **3M 1080 Gloss Black Vinyl** on the grille and side blades
